---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case
Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What equipment, what scenario, what pain point?

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Target Tier
- [ ] Community (free) — available to all users
- [ ] Pro (Developer/Business/Enterprise) — paid feature
- [ ] Not sure

## Equipment Type (if applicable)
- [ ] AHU
- [ ] Boiler
- [ ] Chiller
- [ ] Heat Pump
- [ ] RTU
- [ ] Zone Reheat
- [ ] Cooling Tower
- [ ] Pool
- [ ] Residential
- [ ] Other: ___

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references.
